programme.title: How To Fall In Love By Christmas
programme.desc: (G) Nora tries to save her lifestyle brand by writing a column about trying to fall in love by Christmas. With help from a handsome photographer, Nora learns the magic of Christmas.

programme.title: Unforgettable Christmas
programme.desc: (G) Princess Colette prefers fashion design to royal duties. After developing amnesia, she works with designer Wilson James on a Christmas collection, discovering her true calling.

programme.title: Christmas In The Highlands
programme.desc: (G) A New York sales manager is sent to the remote Scottish Highlands at Christmas to acquire a limited edition perfume from a dashing Earl preparing for his annual ball.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
